postconditions: result == (seen_tx < tx_store && tx_store < tx_index && tx_index < receipts && receipts < tx_locs && tx_locs < tx_locs_v3 && tx_locs_v3 < internal_traces)
acceptance_criteria: Stable tx namespace safety: tx-related StableBTreeMap memory ids are in strict ascending order, which is sufficient evidence that seen_tx, tx_store, tx_index, receipts, tx_locs, tx_locs_v3, and internal_traces cannot share the same stable memory namespace.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core --test prune_safety stable_tx_namespace && cargo test -p evm-db --test chain_data_memory_layout tx_related_memory_ids_are_disjoint
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core pure namespace tests plus evm-db AppMemoryId adapter evidence
